panels.title: Turn rounds distribution — direct vs tool-calling
panels.description: Phase 1f/E. Splits assistant turns by Phase 1d/Y's turn_rounds telemetry: double7=1 is a direct LLM reply (one Workers AI round), double7≥2 is a tool-calling turn (multiple rounds). The ratio is a leading indicator of per-turn cost — a sustained shift toward tool-calling means more neurons burned per turn.

url_options.data: SELECT toStartOfDay(timestamp) AS day, countIf(double7 = 1) AS direct_replies, countIf(double7 >= 2) AS tool_calling_turns FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'orbit_turn' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND blob8 = 'assistant' AND timestamp > toDateTime(intDiv($__from, 1000)) GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Total LLM rounds per day
panels.description: Phase 1f/E. Sum of turn_rounds (double7) across all assistant turns in the window. This is the raw count of Workers AI invocations — the leading indicator for free-tier neuron exhaustion. Pre-1d/Y events have NULL double7 and don't contribute (double7=0 in the SUM).

url_options.data: SELECT toStartOfDay(timestamp) AS day, sum(double7) AS llm_rounds, count() AS turns FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'orbit_turn' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND blob8 = 'assistant' AND double7 > 0 AND timestamp > toDateTime(intDiv($__from, 1000)) GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Turn duration p95 — direct vs tool-calling
panels.description: Phase 1f/E. p95 of duration_ms (double3) per day, split by direct (turn_rounds=1) and tool-calling (turn_rounds≥2) assistant turns. Tool-calling turns dominate latency; widening gap suggests the LLM is taking more rounds to answer, an early signal of regression in the system prompt or grounding payload.

url_options.data: SELECT toStartOfDay(timestamp) AS day, quantile(0.95)(if(double7 = 1, double3, NULL)) AS direct_p95_ms, quantile(0.95)(if(double7 >= 2, double3, NULL)) AS tool_calling_p95_ms FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'orbit_turn' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND blob8 = 'assistant' AND double3 > 0 AND timestamp > toDateTime(intDiv($__from, 1000)) GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Top 10 hashed query terms (browse search)
panels.description: Phase 1f/E. Frequency of hashed search queries via the browse-side search bar. The docent's query payload is not hashed at emit time — raw user prompts would defeat the privacy contract — so this panel uses browse_search as a proxy for 'topics users are exploring' and surfaces hashed values only. The hash is the same 12-hex-char SHA-256 prefix `src/analytics/hash.ts` produces; pair with manual log-replay (server-side, gated to on-call) when an investigation needs the original term.

url_options.data: SELECT blob5 AS query_hash, count() AS search_count FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'browse_search' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > toDateTime(intDiv($__from, 1000)) GROUP BY query_hash ORDER BY search_count DESC LIMIT 10
